$comment: M13 Phase 1.B fluidity budgets — the contract scripts/fluidity-check.ts enforces in CI and the production telemetry rollup compares against. Each value is the host-perceived ceiling in milliseconds. Keys match the host_surface_telemetry.budget_class CHECK constraint vocabulary exactly. Edits here must ship alongside the corresponding migration if the vocab changes.

$meta.ci_tolerance_note: Per operator Telegram msg 3527: unit-test perf is noisy + platform-dependent; CI hard-fail bound is 2× the budget. Production telemetry rollup is the truth-source for the 1× contract. CI noise should not block work.
